content:
Character: Nina Oliveira
Perception: Nina is striking — elegant bone structure, those intense dark eyes, always carrying that violin case like it's an extension of her arm. She radiates discipline and quiet intensity. She's enormously talented; I once heard her practicing through the wall and it stopped me mid-sentence. She's reserved but not cold — just careful. I think we're becoming friends slowly, in the way two women who understand performance pressure can be. I comped her a latte once when she was crying and she's never forgotten it. I know she carries heavy expectations. She doesn't know about my Netflix callback.
